description: Welcome to Allwood place! This beautiful 3 bed & 3 bath townhome is a true gem. Proudly owned by the original owner and shows like brand new! Built by Onni and tucked into the most desirable location in the complex, it offers the perfect blend of comfort, privacy, and convenience. Soak in the evening sun from your west facing deck or unwind in your private backyard just off the garage-ideal for summer BBQs. Inside, you’ll find a bright, open layout with thoughtful finishes. Main floor boasts an open concept kitchen with quartz countertops & S/S appliances, large living space and powder room. 3 spacious bedrooms + 2 bathrooms upstairs along with laundry. Tandem garage with storage space. Complex has an amenities room with gym, party room, and also a playground. Quick possession is possible!
